div.span: P1 Define and register runtime behavior
P3 Assemble HELP DATA and references
P5 Validate identity, coverage, and drift
P7 Capture runtime and review proof
P8 Curate MDO work orders and decisions
P9 Inventory, validate, and package manuals
P10 Promote diagrams, manuals, catalogs, and pages
D1 Source, headers, registries, usage and contract blocks
D2 Compiled fallback messages and generated reference headers
D3 Active messaging workspace: SYSTEM_MESSAGES, SYSTEM_MESSAGE_TEXT, DTX, CDX / LMDB
D4 HELP DATA v2: topics, sections, lines, artifacts
D5 Metadata catalogs: SYSCMD, SYSSUBCMD, SYSFUNC, SYSARGS, SYSMSG
D6 Validation reports and candidate crosswalks
D7 SelfDoc manifests, policies, inventories, and provenance reports
D8 Proof registry, transcripts, hashes, screenshots, and canaries
D9 MDO work orders, review packets, section maps, and diagram ledgers
D10 Manualgen inventories, manifests, parity reports, and draft workspaces
D12 x64base.com and dottalkpp.com published surfaces
